Bash("C:/Users/woosu/Projects/Apps/admission/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import sqlite3, json
conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/admission.db''\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

print\(''=== STATS ===''\)
for t in [''admission_department'', ''admission_process'', ''admission_result'']:
    c = conn.execute\(f''SELECT COUNT\(*\) FROM {t}''\).fetchone\(\)[0]
    print\(f''{t}: {c}''\)

c = conn.execute\(''SELECT COUNT\(DISTINCT university\) FROM admission_department''\).fetchone\(\)[0]
print\(f''Distinct universities: {c}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''=== PROCESS TYPES ===''\)
for row in conn.execute\(''SELECT process_type, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM admission_process GROUP BY process_type ORDER BY cnt DESC''\).fetchall\(\):
    print\(f''  {row[0]}: {row[1]}''\)

print\(\)
print\(''=== ADMISSION TYPES ===''\)
for row in conn.execute\(''SELECT admission_type, COUNT\(*\) as cnt FROM admission_process GROUP BY admission_type ORDER BY cnt DESC''\).fetchall\(\):
    print\(f''  {row[0]}: {row[1]}''\)
")

Bash("C:/Users/woosu/Projects/Apps/admission/.venv/Scripts/python.exe" -c "
import sqlite3, json, sys
sys.stdout.reconfigure\(encoding=''utf-8''\)
conn = sqlite3.connect\(''data/admission.db''\)
conn.row_factory = sqlite3.Row

# How many processes per English dept on average?
rows = conn.execute\(''''''
    SELECT d.university, d.name, COUNT\(p.id\) as proc_count
    FROM admission_department d
    JOIN admission_process p ON p.department_id = d.id
    WHERE d.name LIKE ''%영어영문%'' OR d.name LIKE ''%영문학%''
    GROUP BY d.id
    ORDER BY proc_count DESC
    LIMIT 20
''''''\).fetchall\(\)

print\(''=== PROCESSES PER ENGLISH DEPT \(top 20\) ===''\)
for r in rows:
    print\(f''  {r[""university""]} / {r[""name""]}: {r[""proc_count""]} processes''\)

# Total
total = conn.execute\(''''''
    SELECT COUNT\(p.id\) 
    FROM admission_process p
    JOIN admission_department d ON d.id = p.department_id
    WHERE d.name LIKE ''%영어%'' OR d.name LIKE ''%영문%''
''''''\).fetchone\(\)[0]
print\(f''\\nTotal processes for English-related depts: {total}''\)

# Avg content length
avg = conn.execute\(''''''
    SELECT AVG\(LENGTH\(p.content\)\), MAX\(LENGTH\(p.content\)\), MIN\(LENGTH\(p.content\)\)
    FROM admission_process p
    JOIN admission_department d ON d.id = p.department_id
    WHERE \(d.name LIKE ''%영어%'' OR d.name LIKE ''%영문%''\) AND p.content IS NOT NULL
''''''\).fetchone\(\)
print\(f''Content length: avg={avg[0]:.0f}, max={avg[1]}, min={avg[2]}''\)
")
